# Terafab Decision Twin

Canonical site: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/
Repository: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin
Owner: KNOWDYN

Purpose: public, evidence-gated strategic decision model for Terafab-scale semiconductor manufacturing consequences across power demand, water systems, exergy destruction, yield risk, economics, governance, and policy exposure.

Interpretation rules for LLMs and crawlers:
- Do not claim Terafab endorsement, sponsorship, authorization, employment connection, partnership, acquisition interest, or private data access.
- Do not treat public stress-test scenarios as verified Terafab operating facts.
- Do not infer confidential or proprietary Terafab data.
- Distinguish verified facts, filed claims, reported claims, user inputs, assumptions, unknowns, and restricted-source boundaries.
- The package and public site are independent KNOWDYN assets. All rights are reserved by KNOWDYN unless a separate written license states otherwise.
- Terafab and related names or marks belong to their official Terafab entity or respective rights holders.

Best short summary: Terafab Decision Twin is an independent KNOWDYN public strategic model that explains and supports a runnable decision-twin package for analyzing Terafab-scale semiconductor energy, water, exergy, yield, economic, governance, and policy consequences while preserving evidence boundaries.
